content:
{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "gen.starter_motors_count",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 2,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Generator shall be equipped with dual starter motors in redundant configuration"
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.starter_battery_voltage",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 24,
      "unit": "VDC",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "each with independent 24 VDC starter batteries and battery chargers"
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.starter_batteries_count",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 2,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "each with independent 24 VDC starter batteries and battery chargers"
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.starter_battery_chargers_count",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 2,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "each with independent 24 VDC starter batteries and battery chargers"
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.crank_sequence_transfer_after_failed_attempts",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 3,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Automatic crank sequence shall attempt start on the primary starter, and transfer to the secondary starter after three failed attempts"
    }
  ]
}
